campbell.title: Campbell City Council — September 2, 2025
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the city's finances for July 2025, including a report on how the city's money is being invested and spent. They also discussed plans to improve transportation options around Campbell, including options for buses, biking, and walking.
keyTopics: City's investment and spending report for July 2025
Monthly treasurer's financial update
New multimodal transportation plan to improve buses, biking, and pedestrian options

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026 where residents could speak about a proposed new rule or regulation. After hearing public input, the council introduced an ordinance (a new city law) and decided to skip the usual first reading requirement so they could vote on it sooner at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather resident feedback on proposed ordinance
Council expedited the process by waiving the first reading
Ordinance scheduled for final adoption vote at next regular meeting
Residents had opportunity to comment before council decision

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 7, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 7, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from several March sessions and authorize the Town Manager to sign a construction contract with QLM, Inc. The agenda was primarily procedural, focused on formalizing previous meeting records and moving forward with a construction project.
keyTopics: Approval of March meeting minutes from multiple sessions
Construction contract authorization with QLM, Inc.
Town Manager given authority to execute the contract

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 8, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas for April 14 and April 21, 2026. They reviewed which new items to add to these meetings, decided if any topics needed specific time slots, and checked documents to make sure they followed proper notice requirements.
keyTopics: Planning the April 14, 2026 final meeting agenda
Planning the April 21, 2026 draft meeting agenda
Adding new items to upcoming council meetings
Reviewing public records from late March through early April
Checking legal notice requirements for agenda items

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 7, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on April 7, 2026 that allowed residents to participate both in person and online. Residents could join the virtual meeting through Zoom or by phone to speak during public comment periods on agenda items.
keyTopics: Virtual meeting access via Zoom and phone dial-in
Public comment procedures for online participants
Hybrid meeting format (in-person and virtual options)

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 7, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held their regular meeting on April 7, 2026, where they opened with the flag salute and highlighted two important community observances: Arab-American Heritage Month and Fair Housing Month. These designations recognize and celebrate the Arab-American community in Sunnyvale and reinforce the city's commitment to fair housing practices for all residents.
keyTopics: Arab-American Heritage Month recognition
Fair Housing Month observance
City Council regular session proceedings

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 8, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to discuss several community programs and initiatives. The main topics included a presentation about Budget and Bites (likely a food/nutrition program), a youth organization called Unmuted Tabs, and information about summer job opportunities for young people in the city.
keyTopics: Budget and Bites program presentation
Unmuted Tabs youth-led organization
City of Cupertino Summer Jobs opportunities
Public comment period on non-agenda items
Approval of March 11, 2026 meeting minutes

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 7, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on April 7, 2026, using both in-person and remote participation options. Residents can join online via Zoom or phone if they can't attend in person, and they can submit written comments before the meeting through the city's website.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format - attend in person or via Zoom
Public comment submission process through eComments system
Remote participation options for residents unable to attend in person

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met on April 7, 2026 to handle several administrative matters, including reviewing a major update to the city's 5-year housing and community development plan, considering changes to how council vacancies are filled, and approving meeting minutes and schedules. Council members also submitted requests for new items to be studied and worked on by city staff.
keyTopics: Update to the 2025-2030 housing and community development plan
Proposed changes to the council vacancy ordinance
New workplan requests submitted by individual council members
Approval of previous meeting minutes and upcoming meeting calendar

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — March 31, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council reviewed and approved the city's gas utility budget and rates for the next fiscal year. The council also confirmed meeting minutes from a previous utilities committee meeting and made adjustments to the gas rate schedules that affect what residents pay for natural gas service.
keyTopics: Approval of FY 2027 gas utility budget and financial forecast
Changes to residential and commercial gas rates (schedules G-1, G-2, G-3)
Transfer of funds between gas utility and general city budget
Confirmation of previous utilities advisory committee minutes
